sections.paragraph:
ἀργέω 1 aor. ἤργησα (s. ἀργός; Soph., Hippocr. et al.; pap fr. PPetr II, 4 [9], 4 [225/224 b.c.] on; LXX; OdeSol 11:23; ApcrEzk, Denis p. 122 [Epiph 64, 70, 14]; Jos., C. Ap. 2, 282) to stop doing someth., slack off, become idle (w. ἐγκαταλείπειν) ἀπὸ τῆς ἀγαθοποιΐας 1 Cl 33:1. Abs. (Agatharchides: 86 Fgm. 20, 209 Jac. [in Jos., C. Ap. 1, 209]) τὸ κρίμα ἔκπαλαι οὐκ ἀργεῖ from ancient times (their) condemnation has not been idle i.e. it is being prepared 2 Pt 2:3 (cp. 1 Esdr 2:26 ἤργει ἡ οἰκοδομή=the construction was delayed).—M-M. TW.

aor. aor. = aorist

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

  1. fr. = from

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

OdeSol OdeSol = Gk. Ode of Solomon 11: PBodmer XI; III a.d.—List 2

ApcrEzk ApcrEzk = Apocryphon Ezechiel—List 2

Denis Denis = AD., Fragmenta pseudepigraphorum quae supersunt Graeca—Lists 2 beg., 5, 6

Epiph Epiph , IV–V a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

someth. someth. = something

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Agatharchides Agatharchides , of Cnidus, II b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 128
